channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Metal Slug 30th anniversary website launched, teases ‘Mission Reboot’
item.content:encoded:
30 years and still running.

SNK has launched a special website and released a retrospective video celebrating the 30th anniversary of side-scrolling run-and-gun action game series Metal Slug, which tease “Mission Reboot.”

“To celebrate 30 years of Metal Slug action, we’re reigniting and rebooting the series with a wide range of exciting projects—including new ventures in gaming!,” reads the official website.

Here is an overview of the series, via the special website:

30 years and still running.

Metal Slug‘s detailed pixel art and charming, lighthearted visuals set it apart from the rest when it hit arcades in 1996.

Players have been spellbound by the game’s vibrant graphics ever since—whether it be comically expressive soldiers and their nuanced movements, or giant war machines whose destruction shakes the entire screen. Coupled with its simple, intuitive controls and fast-paced gameplay, it’s little wonder this SNK classic garnered acclaim not just in the arcade but on home consoles as well.

Even now, 30 years on, the Metal Slug series continues to evolve. Still running, still gunning—with no end in sight.

Strap in and stay tuned for what lies on the horizon!

Watch the retrospective below.

Metal Slug 30th Anniversary Retrospective



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/metal-slug-30th-anniversary-website-launched-teases-mission-reboot
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Neverness to Everness launch trailer; music collaborations announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone

Tracks from Persona 5 Royal, Persona 5: The Phantom X, and Tower of Fantasy.

Publisher Perfect World Games and developer Hotta Studio have released the launch trailer and a music collaborations announcement trailer for free-to-play supernatural urban open-world action RPG Neverness to Everness.

The music collaborations featured in the game include:

  • Persona 5 Royal
    • “Beneath the Mask -rain-“
    • “Life Will Change”
  • Persona 5: The Phantom X
    • “Ambitions and Visions”
    • “Show Stealer”
    • “Wake Up Your Hero”
    • “Desire Surrender”
    • “Deep Zone”
    • “Last Strike”
    • “Rage Education”
    • “Gone With The Storm”
    • “Star Shine”
    • “Paradisum”
  • Tower of Fantasy
    • “Chocolate”
    • “Go, Chaser”
    • “In The Light”
    • “Meant To Be”
    • “New World”
    • “The Seed of Dreams”
    • “Mirafleur Hall”
    • “A Midsummer Night’s Dream”

Here is a brief overview of the game, via Perfect World Games:

Appraiser, welcome to Eibon Antique Shop.

As the Appraiser and a member of Eibon, you must have received your first commission. We’re sure you have questions about the job. It is true that Anomaly Hunters are often asked to help solve problems and deal with all sorts of anomalies, like “Mysties,” who are up to no good and preventing customers from getting hot pot, or “Ora Punchers,” who eagerly crave to fight passersby in a tournament.

Some even define “Anomaly Hunters” as those who take commissions related to anomalies. All these people can see, is that Anomaly Hunters are always running to their next commission. However, Appraiser, it’s up to you to find your own definition as you spend more time at Eibon.
One might say that the clients of this commission consist of everyone from Eibon.

Listen to the voice within, and move at your own pace as you take it all in. The city, with your trust, will in time reward you with days that are vibrant, colorful, and worth remembering.

Appraiser, wonderful encounters are waiting for you.

Neverness to Everness is due out for PlayStation 5, PC, iOS, and Android on April 23 in China and April 29 worldwide.

Watch the trailers below.

Launch Trailer: Play On!

English

Japanese

Korean

Music Collaboration: Unlock a Different Side of Hethereau

English

Japanese

Korean

Launch Preview Special Program
